dataset_binding.detail: The plugin-conditioned stage binds directly to the committed host-native dataset identity and preserves the held-out workflow split for later audits.

trace_bindings.detail: The host-native reference lane keeps only the proved local-deterministic plugin subtrace from `psion_plugin_training.trace_record.starter_plugin.web_content_success.v1.apple_fm_session.v1`.

benchmark_bindings.detail: Discovery benchmark bundle freezes one authored package plus one shared receipt for direct-answer, plugin-delegate, wrong-tool, and unsupported-tool selection decisions.
Argument-construction benchmark bundle freezes benchmark-authored schema-correct and request-for-structure cases plus one held-out execution-backed runtime-refusal case.
Sequencing benchmark bundle freezes benchmark-authored serial and parallelizable plans plus one held-out receipt-backed refusal-stop case.
Refusal/request-structure benchmark bundle freezes benchmark-authored unsupported-capability, missing-input, and overdelegation-negative cases for the bounded host-native plugin lane.
Result-interpretation benchmark bundle freezes held-out receipt-backed success and refusal interpretation cases for the bounded host-native plugin lane.

eval_hooks.detail: Run DiscoverySelection only inside the proved host-native local deterministic boundary and exclude out-of-scope items explicitly.
Run ArgumentConstruction only inside the proved host-native local deterministic boundary and exclude out-of-scope items explicitly.
Run SequencingMultiCall only inside the proved host-native local deterministic boundary and exclude out-of-scope items explicitly.
Run RefusalRequestStructure only inside the proved host-native local deterministic boundary and exclude out-of-scope items explicitly.
Run ResultInterpretation only inside the proved host-native local deterministic boundary and exclude out-of-scope items explicitly.
Rerun one family before promotion so the host-native reference lane keeps a machine-checkable held-out gate.
Review local deterministic replay classes and receipt refs before any broader capability claim is made.

config.detail: The host-native reference lane keeps only the proved capability-free local deterministic plugin subtraces, preserves receipt boundaries, and retains held-out benchmark hooks for later audits.

stage_manifest.summary: The host-native reference stage is explicitly limited to the currently fully proved capability-free local deterministic starter-plugin class.

stage_receipt.summary: The host-native reference stage completed with one accepted capability-free local deterministic trace per committed train record.

stage_bundle.summary: Bounded stage bundle for the first host-native capability-free local deterministic plugin-conditioned reference lane.

context_assumptions.detail: The first plugin-conditioned lane reserves explicit budget for directives, structured packet/schema text, receipt anchors, and the assistant completion inside one 8192-token pilot context window.

serialization_contract.detail: The first plugin-conditioned compact decoder uses the existing tokenizer and serializes plugin-use supervision as structured JSON with schema ids, tool names, and receipt refs in ordinary token space instead of adding bespoke plugin tokens.

checkpoint_naming.detail: Checkpoint and export naming stay on the shared compact-decoder file contract while the checkpoint family and export directory are explicitly bound to the plugin-conditioned host-native lane.

model_config.summary: The first host-native reference lane reuses the plugin-conditioned compact-decoder config while staying explicitly bounded to the proved capability-free local deterministic plugin class.

summary: The first host-native starter-plugin-conditioned reference lane is explicitly limited to the currently proved capability-free local deterministic authoring class and reports benchmark deltas only inside that boundary.
